steps.title: Set up the discriminant
steps.content:
Substituting $y = -0.5$ into $y = x^2 + 8x + a$:
$$x^2 + 8x + a = -0.5$$
$$x^2 + 8x + (a + 0.5) = 0$$
For no real solutions, the discriminant must be negative:
$$8^2 - 4(1)(a + 0.5) < 0$$

steps.title: Solve for the least integer $a$
steps.content:
$$64 - 4a - 2 < 0$$
$$62 < 4a$$
$$a > 15.5$$
The least positive integer satisfying $a > 15.5$ is $a = 16$.

The answer is 16.
